chapterTitle: Spark and Big Data Analytics: Spark, Introduction to Data Analysis with Spark.

topics.title: 4 Develop a MapReduce program to find the tags associated with each movie by analyzing movie lens data
5 Implement Functions: Count – Sort – Limit – Skip – Aggregate using MongoDB 6 Write Pig Latin scripts to sort
7 Use Hive to create, alter, and drop databases, tables, views, functions, and indexes
8 Implement a word count program in Hadoop and Spark
9 Use CDH (Cloudera Distribution for Hadoop) and HUE (Hadoop User Interface) to analyze data and generate reports for sample datasets
